hero.title: Hi, I'm Tomas Olaya Diaz. I build robust backends and secure networks.
hero.subtitle: Systems Engineering Student at Escuela Colombiana de Ingeniería Julio Garavito | Academic Monitor in Logic and Discrete Mathematics | Passionate about Backend Development, Cybersecurity, and Artificial Intelligence
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I specialize in backend development using Java and Spring Boot, but I have a strong full-stack mentality that allows me to understand and contribute to all layers of software development.
about.p2: As an Academic Monitor for Logic and Discrete Mathematics, I have developed exceptional communication, leadership, and complex problem-solving skills.
about.p3: I am committed to continuous learning: I hold professional certifications in Web Development (Sep 2025) and Cybersecurity & Ethical Hacking (Apr 2026). Additionally, I have a deep interest in integrating Generative AI for productivity, having completed specific training in this area.
about.gym: Discipline 🏋️‍♂️: Beyond code, I enjoy maintaining a consistent physical training routine at the gym.
skills.title: Tech Stack
projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.techcup.title: Tech Cup Competition
projects.techcup.desc: I led the development of the Mercedes Benz microservice using agile methodologies, acting as Scrum Master and technical lead. The architecture was designed using a microservices approach to ensure high availability and scalability. The project stood out for its technical robustness, excellent team management, and successful final deployment, demonstrating my ability to lead complex enterprise solutions.
projects.studentvault.title: StudentVault-DVA
projects.studentvault.desc: A comprehensive academic management and storage project designed for maximum scalability. I developed the backend using Java and Spring Boot to orchestrate complex business logic, implementing relational databases to ensure absolute integrity of student data. I used Docker for consistent deployments and Postman for exhaustive validation of the RESTful API. This architecture ensures fast response times and secure persistence of critical data.
